overview: A professional Biscuit Manufacturing, FMCG, Distribution, Retail, and Inventory Management System admin dashboard for Bikaner Biscuit with fully theme-driven colors.
features: Dynamic theme-driven colors with no hardcoded values
Bikaner Biscuit branding and visual identity
FMCG dashboard widgets including inventory status, low stock alerts, production metrics, delivery tracking
Warm amber and brown theme preset
